compiled_state.title: test-sprint-review-scope-check.sh: getcwd fails after temp dir deletion in CI
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: CI Script Tests failure. 6 tests fail with 'shell-init: error retrieving current directory: getcwd: cannot access parent directories: No such file or directory'. The test creates temp directories, cd's into them, then deletes them — causing a stale CWD. This is a test infrastructure issue where the test doesn't cd back before cleanup.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). severity=1 (CI blocking), complexity=0 (single file, obvious getcwd error), environment=1 (CI), intermittent=0. Route: BASIC investigation.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Anti-pattern scan: checked other tests for missing cd REPO_ROOT pattern. The scope-check test's REPO_ROOT+subshell pattern is used in ~30 other test files, but they all pass in CI — the getcwd issue appears specific to how sprint-review-scope-check.sh interacts with here-strings under suite-engine TMPDIR isolation. No additional occurrences need fixing.
comments.author: Main
